summary:
Fixed the “duplicate apply after snapshot + restart” bug.

Root cause  
InstallSnapshot restored the state machine but only advanced lastApplied, leaving commitIndex behind. After a crash, Restart() resets lastApplied back to commitIndex (0 in the test), causing log entries already represented in the snapshot to be applied a second time.

Fix (in app/snapshot.go)  
After restoring the snapshot we now set:

    n.lastApplied = snap.LastIncludedIndex
    if n.commitIndex < snap.LastIncludedIndex {
        n.commitIndex = snap.LastIncludedIndex
    }

Keeping commitIndex ≥ lastIncludedIndex preserves the invariant across crashes and prevents duplicate application of snapshot-covered entries.

Running test.sh now passes all rounds.
